name: united-tattoo
description: United Tattoo website - Astro + Cloudflare Workers

scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler deploy --config astro/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.deploy:dry-run: npm run build && npx wrangler deploy --config astro/wrangler.jsonc --dry-run
scripts.fresh: npm run clean && npm install && npm --prefix astro install && npm run dev
scripts.ci:smoke: test -f astro/dist/_worker.js/index.js && echo 'Build output OK' || (echo 'Build output missing!' && exit 1)
